failure_reason: The first endpoint z-error trace worker did not inherit Isaac Sim EULA/cache/Vulkan environment variables, so importing isaacsim attempted an interactive EULA prompt and raised EOFError.
resolution: Added OMNI_KIT_ACCEPT_EULA=YES, ACCEPT_EULA=Y, OMNI cache dirs, VK_ICD_FILENAMES, ISAAC_PATH, and GPU foundation LD_LIBRARY_PATH to the endpoint trace worker environment, then reran the full-size 2048 env x 299 step trace successfully.
